_comment: Cross-implementation golden vectors for field-level AES-256-GCM encryption.
_contract: All three platform implementations MUST produce byte-identical output for the same inputs:
_impls: JVM (Java 21 JCE AES/GCM/NoPadding) — this file was generated from this impl
Node (Node.js crypto module, createCipheriv) — LAUNCH-GATE: must verify before prod
Device (react-native-quick-crypto / BoringSSL) — LAUNCH-GATE: EAS build required
_regenerate: Only regenerate by bumping the envelope version (0x01 → 0x02 + 'v2:' AAD prefix). Changing these bytes without updating mobile/Node fixtures silently breaks cross-platform decryption.

vectors.description: Canonical golden vector: plaintext 'hello', all-zero 32-byte DEK, all-zero 12-byte IV, standard AAD
notes: base64 variant: RFC 4648 standard (padded, '=' suffix) — NOT base64url
tag binds: accountId + collection + recordId + fieldName — any mismatch → tag fail
ciphertext length = plaintext length (GCM is a stream cipher, no padding)
generated by: JVM Java 21, JCE AES/GCM/NoPadding, 128-bit tag, 2026-07-06

registry_vectors._contract: These 8 entries are the FROZEN registry tuples from docs/security/field-aad-registry.md. Mobile (react-native-quick-crypto) and Node MUST reproduce byte-identically. Regenerate ONLY on an envelope version bump (0x01 → 0x02 + 'v2:' AAD prefix).
registry_vectors._frozen_tokens: collection and fieldName tokens are camelCase EXACTLY as defined in AccountExportService frozen constants — never the snake_case DB column names.
registry_vectors._shared_test_dek: All 8 vectors share dek_hex=0x00*32 (test-only all-zero DEK). Each has a distinct IV (000...01 through 000...08) to demonstrate IV independence.

vectors.description: Tuple 1/8 — selfLog / valueNumeric (self_log.value_numeric). Realistic weight numeric. IV=...01.
notes: AccountExportService constants: COLL_SELF_LOG='selfLog', FIELD_SELF_LOG_VALUE_NUMERIC='valueNumeric'
base64 variant: RFC 4648 standard (padded, '=' suffix) — NOT base64url
tag binds: accountId + collection + recordId + fieldName — any mismatch → tag fail
generated by: JVM Java 21, JCE AES/GCM/NoPadding, 128-bit tag, 2026-07-06

notes: AccountExportService constants: COLL_SELF_LOG='selfLog', FIELD_SELF_LOG_VALUE_NUMERIC_SECONDARY='valueNumericSecondary'
base64 variant: RFC 4648 standard (padded, '=' suffix) — NOT base64url
tag binds: accountId + collection + recordId + fieldName — any mismatch → tag fail
generated by: JVM Java 21, JCE AES/GCM/NoPadding, 128-bit tag, 2026-07-06

vectors.description: Tuple 3/8 — selfLog / valueText (self_log.value_text). Thai UTF-8 plaintext proves multibyte encoding end-to-end. IV=...03.
notes: AccountExportService constants: COLL_SELF_LOG='selfLog', FIELD_SELF_LOG_VALUE_TEXT='valueText'
Thai plaintext 'ปกติ' (normal) = 4 chars × 3 UTF-8 bytes = 12 bytes — proves UTF-8 multibyte handling
base64 variant: RFC 4648 standard (padded, '=' suffix) — NOT base64url
tag binds: accountId + collection + recordId + fieldName — any mismatch → tag fail
generated by: JVM Java 21, JCE AES/GCM/NoPadding, 128-bit tag, 2026-07-06

nist_kat_reference._comment: NIST SP 800-38D known-answer test vectors proving JVM AES-GCM is spec-correct
